title: Floral Prawn Maki Roll
description: A floral and fluffy Japanese dish featuring prawns in a meal-prep friendly format, suitable for vegetarians.
instructions: Prepare the prawns by removing their shells and deveining.
Mix rice vinegar, soy sauce, wasabi paste, and pepper in a small bowl to make the dipping sauce.
Place cooked sushi rice on bamboo mat or in a sushi rolling mat.
Spread a thin layer of avocado over one-third of the sushi rice.
Add evenly spread prawns across the top third of the avocade layer.
Top with cucumber slices and remaining sushi rice.
Wrap the roll tightly with seaweed sheet, starting from the short end of the mat or mat.
